description: Read-capability but POSTs an object-url request. Pins region/label/name-required rejections, the invalid-method rejection, the out-of-range expires_in rejection, and the success POST body. method is validated against the PresignedURLMethod proto enum (GET/PUT) but is case-insensitive: input is uppercased before the check and the canonical uppercase verb is sent. expires_in is deferred to the API's documented default (3600): omitted from the body unless the caller provides it.

cases.name: rejects an invalid method
cases.expect_error: method must be one of: GET, PUT

cases.name: rejects an out-of-range expires_in
cases.expect_error: expires_in must be between 1 and 604800 seconds (7 days), got 700000

cases.name: generates a presigned url with the API default expiry
accepts a lowercase method and sends the uppercased verb
